title: Uni-Com Work Light – Powerful 3W COB LED Torch with Magnetic Back & Hanging Hook, Batteries Included for DIY, Automotive, Camping, Home & Emergency Use, Black
features: Powerful COB LED Illumination – Equipped with a powerful, energy efficienct 3W COB LED, delivering bright, uniform light that is strong enough to illuminate work areas, rooms or outdoor spaces with ease, ideal for close up and wide area tasks.

Flexible Hands-Free Design – Operates handheld or hung using the built-in hook or powerful rear magnet, allowing easy attachment or overhead lighting, keeping light accessible, convenient and hands-free wherever required.
Simple One-Button Control – Easy front-button operation provides instant light when needed, offering convenience and efficiency.
Batteries Included for Instant Use – Supplied with 3 x AAA batteries, this head torch is ready to use straight out of the pack, no additional purchase required.

Compact & Versatile Design – Practical, portable and built for everyday use, this work light ideal for DIY projects and repairs, automotive work, camping trips, nighttime walks or activities, emergencies or general use around the home.
description: The Uni-Com Work Light is a compact and reliable flashlight that ensures you’ll never be left without dependable lighting, providing powerful illumination for a wide variety of tasks and environments. Featuring a high-performance and energy efficient 3W COB LED, it produces a bright, uniform light that is strong enough to illuminate work areas, rooms or outdoor spaces with ease. Flexible in use, the light can be operated handheld or hands-free by using the handy built-in hanging hook or powerful rear magnet, making it easy to attach to metallic surfaces or suspend for overhead lighting, adapting to your needs, depending on the task. With batteries included and a simple press-button operation this work light is ready to use straight from the pack. Practical, portable and reliable, the Uni-Com Work Light is ideal for DIY projects, automotive work, repairs, camping trips, outdoor activities, emergencies and everyday use around the home.
